summary: Plan-only classification: #55563 is the only hydrated open candidate and should remain the live canonical for the in-scope cluster refs. No closure, merge, or fix PR action is planned.

actions.reason: With only #55563 hydrated as an open actionable item, and with the prior representative #54669 excluded as overlap context, #55563 is the best live canonical for the remaining in-scope refs. Its body also contains unique regression details, so it should not be closed as a duplicate of the excluded context ref.
